Description: Moving from on-premise servers to cloud providers (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure) with renewable energy commitments and optimizing resource usage through dynamic allocation and rightsizing
Case_Study_Result: Migrated from on-premise to Google Cloud resulting in 13,000 metric tons CO2 reduction annually, representing a 50% reduction in infrastructure carbon footprint

Description: Implementing permanent remote or hybrid work arrangements to eliminate daily commuting emissions and reduce office space energy requirements
Case_Study_Result: Permanent remote work option resulted in 70% reduction in commute-related emissions and 30% reduction in office energy consumption

Description: Purchasing renewable energy through Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) or Renewable Energy Certificates (RECs) for office and data center operations
Case_Study_Result: Contracted 7+ gigawatts of renewable energy achieving 100% renewable matching since 2017, equivalent to removing 1.2 million cars from roads annually

Description: Implementing AI/ML-based cooling optimization, hot/cold aisle containment, free air cooling, and raising server temperature thresholds to reduce cooling energy
Case_Study_Result: AI-optimized cooling control achieved 40% reduction in cooling energy and 15% reduction in overall Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE)

Description: Extending device lifespan from 3 to 5+ years, implementing refurbishment programs, responsible e-waste recycling, and right-sizing device procurement
Case_Study_Result: Device buyback and refurbishment program achieved 82% device reuse/refurbishment rate, with lifecycle extension from 4 to 5 years resulting in 25% carbon reduction per device

Description: Deploying IoT sensors, smart LED lighting systems, HVAC automation, and occupancy-based controls to eliminate energy waste in office spaces
Case_Study_Result: Smart building deployment across 36 global buildings achieved 38% energy reduction, saving $6.4 million annually and reducing 42,000 metric tons CO2

Description: Optimizing code for efficiency, implementing efficient algorithms, reducing computational waste, leveraging green hosting providers, and minimizing data transfer
Case_Study_Result: Website and streaming optimization reduced homepage data transfer by 80%, resulting in millions of kWh saved annually through reduced server load

Description: Replacing business flights and in-person meetings with high-quality video conferencing infrastructure to eliminate aviation emissions
Case_Study_Result: Virtual Dreamforce 2020 event hosted 75,000 attendees with zero travel, avoiding approximately 33,000 tons of CO2 emissions compared to in-person event

Description: Requiring suppliers to meet carbon reduction standards, prioritizing low-carbon vendors, and actively engaging supply chain partners in emission reduction efforts
Case_Study_Result: Supplier Clean Energy Program enrolled 213 suppliers committed to 100% renewable energy (as of 2022), which will avoid 18 million tons CO2 annually when fully implemented

Description: Transitioning company vehicle fleet from gasoline/diesel to electric vehicles and installing charging infrastructure at facilities
Case_Study_Result: Order of 100,000 electric delivery vans from Rivian projected to save 4 million metric tons of CO2 per year when fully deployed by 2030
